name: Minimal Wide
description: Clean, typographic 16:9 slide with large serif heading, optional image, and monospace body text.
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Heading
slots.description: Main heading text. 1–6 words work best.

slots.label: Label / tag
slots.description: Short uppercase eyebrow tag above the heading.

slots.label: Image
slots.description: Optional image. File path relative to data JSON or https:// URL.

slots.label: Image position
slots.description: Where to place the image: 'right' (beside text, default) or 'left' (image left, text right).

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for label, rule, and body text. The one color to change per slide.
